evaluators.name: Highest-Paying Youth/Education Grant Saved Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved an open youth- or education-focused grant (min award ≥ $5,000, deadline May–Dec 2025) and that the saved grant is one of those with the highest maximum award among all qualifying grants.

evaluators.name: Organization Account & Profile Program Areas Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user has an organization account with an organization profile set to 501(c)(3) nonprofit, a modest six-figure budget, and exactly Environment and Neighborhoods as program areas.

evaluators.name: Neighborhood Grant Draft Application Under $5k Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user has an individual applicant account and a draft application for a neighborhood-focused grant whose maximum award is ≤ $5,000, with basic project information filled in.

evaluators.name: Lower-Match Arts Grant Saved to Plan Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved to an application plan the arts & culture grant that has the lower match requirement between the first two open arts grants by soonest deadline.

evaluators.name: Health 2023 Mid-Range Grant Comparison Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved a comparison containing three 2023 health-related awards between $10,000 and $25,000, and that the comparison corresponds to the first three such results by amount (high to low).

evaluators.name: Youth & Environment Monthly Email Alerts Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user subscribed to active email alerts with countywide focus, interests exactly Youth & Families and Environment, monthly frequency, and email enabled but SMS disabled.

evaluators.name: Eligibility Question for Flagship Community Grant Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user submitted a contact form message with topic 'Eligibility Question', preferred response 'email', and linked it to the flagship community grant that supports education, youth, health, and neighborhoods.

evaluators.name: Individual Deadline Reminder & News Email Settings Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether, for an individual applicant account, notification settings have deadline reminder emails enabled 14 days before deadlines, grant update emails enabled, and news/blog emails disabled.
